ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "middle_initial" TEXT /* Middle initial of the player */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the player */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the player */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the player */,
  "zip" INTEGER /* Zip code of the player */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the player */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Status of the player (active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the player registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team captain */,
  "team_status" TEXT /* Status of the team (active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date when the team was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_captain_id FOREIGN KEY ("captain_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_rosters" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player in the team (e.g., captain, regular player) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the player joined the team */,
  "leave_date" TEXT /* Date when the player left the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "match_time" TEXT /* Time of the match */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the match (bowling alley or lane) */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the match belongs to */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee for the match */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., regular, playoff) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the team */,
  "frame_scores" TEXT /* Detailed scores for each frame */,
  "bonus_points" INTEGER /* Bonus points awarded */,
  "final_score" INTEGER /* Final score after including bonus points */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date when the league was founded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, referee) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the referee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the referee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)
